benefits.description: improved speech and memory recovery after stroke
enhanced overall neurological recovery post-stroke; walking and movement restoration
felt clearer mentally, calmer, more present
improvement in balance issues from stroke

protocol_notes: 8 weeks on, 8 weeks off cycling. Uses subcutaneous injections. Also pursuing Pinealon, Cortexin, Cerebrolysin research. Plans to add oxytocin for social recovery. Did not disclose full protocol publicly due to wanting users to do proper research first. Combines peptide use with physical therapy (PT), occupational therapy (OT), and daily self-directed rehabilitation. Post-stroke timeline approximately 2 years of recovery with Semax as primary intervention.
